description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular metal desk with a smooth, flat work surface and a minimalist industrial design. The desk features three vertically stacked drawers on the right side, each with a recessed handle for easy access, and a modesty panel beneath the desktop for structural support. The left side is open, providing ample legroom, while the right side is enclosed by the drawer unit. The desk is finished in a uniform gray color, giving it a utilitarian and professional appearance suitable for work environments. A small label or nameplate is visible above the knee space, adding a subtle detail to the otherwise plain facade. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, ideal for office, workshop, or institutional use.
description: A robust gray metal desk with three right-side drawers, a flat work surface, and a minimalist industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three drawers on the right, open leg space on the left, and a nameplate above the knee area.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Left side view highlighting the open leg space and the solid side panel without drawers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid side of the drawer unit and the supporting frame beneath the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features three drawers on the right and an open leg space on the left, with a nameplate above the knee area indicating the front.
attribute_usage_context: writing or computer workstation in an office or administrative setting
